title: Miss Independent
excerpt: Bamboo is funny. She misses people like crazy when they're gone, but she's wary of strangers. She loves playing, but totally appreciates her nap time and independence. She's a homebody at heart, and has completely stolen mine for the last…
body:
Bamboo is funny. She misses people like crazy when they're gone, but she's wary of strangers. She loves playing, but totally appreciates her nap time and independence. She's a homebody at heart, and has completely stolen mine for the last 6 years. And when she's not worried, she poses for the cutest photos. Speaking of cute - how about these Studio Calico Mistable products? You can leave them alone for white fabric accents and they are easy and enjoyable to customize.Poser layout // copyright Two Peas In A Bucket Includes a complete list of supplies. I couldn't resist using a few different ways to color them, and made a video showcasing some fun techniques.

Also wanted to share this beautifully done patriotic video.

Happy 4th!
